posts.author: Jesus (Jesus Seijas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I have a Google Spreadsheet that is updated in a daily basis. I am looking for a way to automate or link a column from the Google Spreadsheet to a column on Monday? Is there a way that when the Google Spreadsheet is updated it automatically updates a target column in Monday?

Thank you!
